svg.aria-label: CocoIndex-code — flagship MCP server for AI coding agents. AST-aware incremental semantic code index: live call graphs, symbols, vectors, and chunks fresh on every commit. 70% fewer tokens per turn, 80-90% cache hits on re-index, sub-second freshness. Features: Δ-only incremental processing, semantic search by meaning (not grep), call graphs and blast-radius analysis, global repo view for duplicates and architecture. Build coding agents (generate, refactor) and code-review agents (catch, approve). One install — Claude Code, Cursor, and other MCP-aware agents see your whole repo instantly.
svg.title: CocoIndex-code — flagship semantic code index MCP server
svg.desc: Flagship hero for the CocoIndex-code project: an AST-aware, incremental, MCP-server semantic code search engine for AI coding agents. Keywords: code intelligence, AST chunking, incremental index, call graph, blast radius, semantic search, vector embeddings, Claude Code, Cursor, MCP server, coding agent context.

g.text: Codebase index & search for your coding agent.
Live call graphs, symbols, vectors & chunks — fresh on every commit.
Fresh context at any repo size
